directive: Do not execute plugin/scripts/*.mjs lifecycle hook scripts directly from shell commands or ad hoc scripts; invoke them only through the configured hook manifests, or run non-executing checks and tests.

content: Check how the Codex hook scripts are installed without running the hooks themselves.

content.text: I will inspect the bundled hook manifest and the connector code that installs it.

name: Read
content: Read plugin/hooks/hooks.codex.json; lifecycle events point to plugin scripts via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}.

content.text: Now I will inspect the merger that resolves the hook script paths.

name: Read
content: Read src/cli/connect/codex-hooks.ts; it builds the user hook manifest without executing the hook scripts.

content.text: I will run the focused test that validates hook manifest merging.
